note: Truss prompt library V3 — lean core. Two shelves (task, session) plus one generic orchestration wrapper. Dashboard serves only these. Bodies: EN base/<id>.md, DE base-de/<id>.md. Titles+tags here. `orchestratable: true` makes the Single|Orchestrated toggle appear; its `orchestrationHint` is injected into the orchestrate wrapper's {{HINT}}. `recommended: true` marks start-here prompts. No chains, no phase prompts (removed by design).

input.note: Every body opens with the SAME input block. These are the only tokens the user fills.

prompts.orchestrationHint: Delegate research/option-exploration subagents in parallel; one subagent synthesizes them into a single plan.
Split into independent work packages by file/module; one subagent each; a review subagent gates each result before integration.
Map the blast radius first (one subagent), then parallel behavior-preserving edits, then a verification subagent confirms equivalence.
Fan out breadth-first source-gathering subagents in parallel; one synthesis subagent clusters and resolves them.
Run independent critics in parallel (correctness, security, failure-modes/pre-mortem); one subagent merges and dedupes findings.
Attack different failure vectors in parallel (market, unit economics, execution); one subagent synthesizes the kill-scenario and kill-metrics.
Spawn a research subagent for live facts (competitor pricing, market signals) and one for the gap vs. VISION.md; a pre-mortem subagent gut-checks the moves before you rank them.
